name: Earthbound Release
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>縛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>放</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a Level 6 or higher monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned: Tribute 1 Level 10 "Earthbound" monster; destroy as many monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the combined original ATK of those destroyed monster(s).
eff: When a Level 6 or higher monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned: Tribute 1 Level 10 "Earthbound" monster; destroy as many monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to the combined original ATK of those destroyed monster(s).
